# Copilot Instructions — Valor em Rede

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - React + Vite (JavaScript), financial management platform for community associations.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created manually: package.json, vite.config.js, index.html, src/main.jsx, src/index.css

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Full App.jsx with member contribution flow, manager expense registration, AI category suggestion, offline-first, receipt modal, Amazon People export, transparency view, and history filters.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No extensions required beyond Vite defaults.

- [x] Compile the Project
  - `npm install` completed — 0 vulnerabilities.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Dev task created and running at http://localhost:5173

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Running at http://localhost:5173

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full feature description and usage instructions.
